Best Physiotherapy & Chiropractic in Westlands

Back pain, sports physio, dry needling & sciatica care on Mogotio Rd. Book today.

Call Now WhatsApp Now
✔ Located in Westlands ✔ Home visits available ✔ Modern physiotherapy techniques ✔ Insurance accepted

Are you dealing with any of these?

  • Persistent back or neck pain
  • Shoulder or knee injuries
  • Sports injuries that won't heal
  • Stiffness from long hours at a desk
  • Pain that keeps coming back

You don't have to live with pain. With the right treatment, your body can heal and become stronger than before.

Our Services

Back Pain & Sciatica Care

Relieve pain, improve posture and restore spinal movement.

Sports Physio & Injury Rehab

Recover safely from injuries and return to peak performance.

Dry Needling & Modern Therapy

Target tight muscles and speed up recovery.

Posture & Workplace Therapy

Fix posture issues caused by sitting and screen time.

Home Physiotherapy Visits

Receive treatment in the comfort of your home.

View all services

What you can expect

  • Reduced pain
  • Improved mobility
  • Faster recovery
  • Better posture
  • Return to work or sport

Meet Your Physiotherapist

Katasi Physiotherapy is led by a qualified physiotherapist trained at KMTC and Amref, focused on evidence-based rehabilitation and personalized care for every patient.

Learn more
